ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "item" INTEGER /* Item number of the component */,
  "qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference(s) for the component */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the component */,
  "lib_part" TEXT /* Library part of the component */,
  "footprint" TEXT /* Footprint of the component */,
  "datasheet" TEXT /* Datasheet for the component */,
  "dielectric" TEXT /* Dielectric of the component */,
  "digi_key_pn" TEXT /* Digi-Key part number of the component */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance of the component */,
  "voltage" TEXT /* Voltage of the component */,
  "wattage" TEXT /* Wattage of the component */,
  "display_footprint" TEXT /* Display footprint of the component */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component type */,
  "value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component value */,
  "tolerance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tolerance */,
  "voltage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voltage */,
  "wattage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wattage */,
  "footprint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the footprint */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the component was last updated */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the component manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_pn" TEXT /* Manufacturer part number */,
  "price" TEXT /* Cost of the component */,
  "lead_time" TEXT /* Lead time for the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("value_id") REFERENCES component_values ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_tolerance_id FOREIGN KEY ("tolerance_id") REFERENCES tolerances ("tolerance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_voltage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voltage_id") REFERENCES voltages ("voltage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_wattage_id FOREIGN KEY ("wattage_id") REFERENCES wattages ("wattage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_footprint_id FOREIGN KEY ("footprint_id") REFERENCES component_footprints ("footprint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engineering team responsible for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component value */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tolerances" (
  "tolerance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tolerance */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tolerance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tolerance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voltages" (
  "voltage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voltage */,
  "voltage" TEXT /* Voltage of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the voltage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voltage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wattages" (
  "wattage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wattage */,
  "wattage" TEXT /* Wattage of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wattage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wattage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_footprints" (
  "footprint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each footprint */,
  "footprint" TEXT /* Footprint of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the footprint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("footprint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component in the inventory */,
  "qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in the inventory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the component in the inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level to trigger a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to order when reordering */,
  "last_restocked" TEXT /* Date of the last restock */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component in the order */,
  "qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in the order */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, received) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier from whom the order was placed */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping the order */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, administrator) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the supplier was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the supplier information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
